# Keith Gettmann for Georgia State House District 51

> Official campaign site for Keith Gettmann, Republican candidate for Georgia State House District 51. Focused on safer communities, stronger schools, lower taxes, and common-sense leadership for District 51 families.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Campaign overview, Keith's vision, policy pillars, and ways to support the campaign.
- [Community Council](/community-council): Form for District 51 residents to submit concerns, ideas, and priorities directly to Keith.
- [District 51 Map](/map): Interactive map of Georgia House District 51.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How the campaign collects and uses contact information, including the SMS opt-in program.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Terms of use for the site and SMS messaging program.
